author: vvo
subject: fix(React): require React in order for JSX to work in widgets
body:
Problem: we now use ReactDom.render in widgets/*.
JSX is compiled to React.createElement.

React is not defined since not in the current scope.

Solutions:
- require React and move on (and ignore the eslint check)
- use React.createElement by hand and do not use JSX in widgets

I did the first solution. Easier :)
